claim_text: Destination container port throughput(CPT) is positively related to dengue virus (DENV-1) diffusion in air traffic shipments.

runs.response_text:
VERDICT: NEI

The abstracts provided do not contain information relevant to the claim about container port throughput and dengue virus diffusion in air traffic shipments. The first abstract discusses dengue transmission in Vietnam related to population density and water supply, the second discusses genetic mosquito control methods, and the third addresses immunology of Listeria infection. None of these abstracts address the relationship between port container throughput and DENV-1 spread through
